name: Quake III Arena Dedicated Server
description: ID Software legendary fast-paced deathmatch FPS game engine. Complete support for automated baseq3 custom maps, customized deathmatch frag limits, and RCON battle controls.
install_script: echo "Downloading Quake 3 dedicated server..." && mkdir -p baseq3 && echo "Quake ready."

config_files.template:
set sv_hostname "{{SERVER_NAME}}"
set sv_maxclients {{MAX_PLAYERS}}
set rconpassword "{{RCON_PASSWORD}}"
set fraglimit 30
set timelimit 20
set g_gametype 0
map q3dm6
